nasb.text: The frogs will depart from you and your houses and your servants and your people; they will be left only in the Nile.”

esv.text: The frogs shall go away from you and your houses and your servants and your people. They shall be left only in the Nile.”

cnv.text: 青蛙必離開你和你的宮殿、你的臣僕和你的人民，只留在河裡。”

ccb.text: 明天青蛙会离开你、你的宫殿、你的臣仆和百姓，只留在河里。”
